The '''glacier tauntaun''' was a rangy [[Species/Legends|subspecies]] that inhabited [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth's]] valleys and ice caves. It was largely unstudied by science. Smaller than its larger cousin, the [[Giant tauntaun|common tauntaun]], the glacier variety was identifiable by its high-pitched and humorous screech, as well as its shorter horns, smaller fur, and longer muzzle.<ref name="Wildlife">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref>
